cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what upset Melanie during the National Championships. The passage mentions that she entered the National Championships but "came nowhere." The specific part where she went wrong was when she was following a man and they realized they had gone wrong. The result was that she cycled 20 kilometers too far. Then she cried during the running part. Looking at the options: A) She was tricked by another competitor. The text doesn't mention trickery. She was just following someone, not necessarily a competitor tricking her. B) She felt she had let her teammates down. The passage doesn't talk about teammates here, just her own performance in the race. C) She made a mistake during part of the race. Yes, she made a mistake
